title: Don’t miss this Claude update
summary: Anthropic released Dynamic Workflows in Claude 4.8, enabling the model to launch hundreds of subagents simultaneously within a single session. The system automatically generates task plans, distributes work across agents, and includes verification capabilities for parallel execution of large codebases and research tasks.
writeup: The video covers Claude Opus 4.8 and its Dynamic Workflows feature, which lets the model launch hundreds of subagents at once inside a single session. The system handles planning, task splitting, and coordination of parallel execution, with verification built in. It targets large codebases, cross-file research, and complex multi-step tasks, marking a shift toward agentic workflows that manage parallel work automatically rather than running steps sequentially.
